item.title: 富裕層マネー、香港へ480兆円流入 「不要論」覆す復活 www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
富裕層マネー、香港へ480兆円流入　「不要論」覆す復活
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

資産管理残高はスイスを抜き首位。

国家安全維持法でデモや民主派は消えたものの、海外企業の74％が「悪影響はない」。

中国本土への外資の玄関口にもなっています。
item.content:encoded:
富裕層マネー、香港へ480兆円流入　「不要論」覆す復活
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

資産管理残高はスイスを抜き首位。

国家安全維持法でデモや民主派は消えたものの、海外企業の74％が「悪影響はない」。

中国本土への外資の玄関口にもなっています。

item.title: President Donald Trump called to bar big investors from the …
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: President Donald Trump called to bar big investors from the US housing market. Six months later, the effort ended in a compromise that still offers the biggest landlords plenty of ways to grow.
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump called to bar big investors from the US housing market. Six months later, the effort ended in a compromise that still offers the biggest landlords plenty of ways to grow.

item.title: 【熱中症警戒アラート】 今日7月13日(月)、環境省と気象庁は熱中症警戒アラートを西日本の15地域に発表しました。兵庫県…
item.author: ウェザーニュース (@weathernews.jp)
item.description:
【熱中症警戒アラート】
今日7月13日(月)、環境省と気象庁は熱中症警戒アラートを西日本の15地域に発表しました。兵庫県、香川県、鳥取県は今季初の発表です。

対象地域では特に熱中症のリスクが高くなります。積極的に熱中症予防を行ってください。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...
item.content:encoded:
【熱中症警戒アラート】
今日7月13日(月)、環境省と気象庁は熱中症警戒アラートを西日本の15地域に発表しました。兵庫県、香川県、鳥取県は今季初の発表です。

対象地域では特に熱中症のリスクが高くなります。積極的に熱中症予防を行ってください。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...

item.title: Sources: David Ellison's advisers are urging him to move Par…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Sources: David Ellison's advisers are urging him to move Paramount's HQ and much of its spending out of California if AG Rob Bonta sues to block the WBD merger (Rohan Goswami/Semafor)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:

最近ぼざろの絵が多くなってますね。。
来週は出来れば違う二次創作にします
そして色塗りペン入れ間に合わなかったw

item.title: "ShoreFreakのヘビロテ"033 Cutemen「RELAX」 youtu.be/jZavpzMosyk?.…
item.author: ShoreFreak (@shorefreak.bsky.social)
item.description:
"ShoreFreakのヘビロテ"033

Cutemen「RELAX」

youtu.be/jZavpzMosyk?...

CMJKとPicorinのユニット「Cutemen」です
アルバム「COVERS & MELLOW TUNES」からです
CMJKは電気グルーヴやアイドルグループの楽曲提供でも有名ですね

英国のバンド「Frankie Goes To Hollywood」のカバーです
本家の曲は詞の内容やMVの過激さからBBC、NHKなどでは確か放送禁止になってます

原曲よりもBPMがかなり速く、”ハードコアテクノ”なアレンジ
かなり細かくシンセの音色が切り替わっていきます
item.content:encoded:
"ShoreFreakのヘビロテ"033

Cutemen「RELAX」

youtu.be/jZavpzMosyk?...

CMJKとPicorinのユニット「Cutemen」です
アルバム「COVERS & MELLOW TUNES」からです
CMJKは電気グルーヴやアイドルグループの楽曲提供でも有名ですね

英国のバンド「Frankie Goes To Hollywood」のカバーです
本家の曲は詞の内容やMVの過激さからBBC、NHKなどでは確か放送禁止になってます

原曲よりもBPMがかなり速く、”ハードコアテクノ”なアレンジ
かなり細かくシンセの音色が切り替わっていきます

item.title: Happy Cirno Sunday! The current vibe is thinking about the P…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Cirno Sunday! The current vibe is thinking about the Pop Team Epic anime! ngl Pop Team Epic was so amazing 🥹 the first season is one of the funniest things I've ever seen, and the opening was beautiful, it was immaculate 😭 I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Cirno Sunday! The current vibe is thinking about the Pop Team Epic anime! ngl Pop Team Epic was so amazing 🥹 the first season is one of the funniest things I've ever seen, and the opening was beautiful, it was immaculate 😭 I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

ラジオ本放送の日📻

現NHKが開始したみたい

今はラジオもネット経由も

item.content:encoded:

大正14年に東京放送局

今はラジオもネット経由も
多いかもね

今日もヨロシクお願いします🤗💝

#うちの子

item.title: I played Echo Isle! The game took little under 1.5 hours to …
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: I played Echo Isle! The game took little under 1.5 hours to beat. This was an insanely cool game! The game did an amazing job of emulating the look and feel of an old school Zelda game, everything from the graphics to the gameplay were spot on! It was a really fun, charming, and nostalgic game!
item.content:encoded: I played Echo Isle! The game took little under 1.5 hours to beat. This was an insanely cool game! The game did an amazing job of emulating the look and feel of an old school Zelda game, everything from the graphics to the gameplay were spot on! It was a really fun, charming, and nostalgic game!

item.title: -阿良々木くん、仮装するのにどうしてそんなに時間がかかるの？ -もう着たんだけど、トイレから出るのが恥ずかしいんだ …
item.author: エルさん (Eru-san) (@bsdmoe.bsky.social)
item.description:
-阿良々木くん、仮装するのにどうしてそんなに時間がかかるの？

-もう着たんだけど、トイレから出るのが恥ずかしいんだ

-さあ、恥ずかしがらないで、阿良々木くん。神原ちゃんと出かけるのが怖くなかったんだから、仮装して出かけるくらい怖くないでしょ

-でも、何言ってるの？！ ショッピングモールに行く途中で彼女に偶然会っただけだよ

-本当なら、何があっても仮装したまま出てきてよ

-でも、これ、子供用のゴジラの仮装だよ！

-でも、すごく可愛く似合ってるよ

-君にはそう見えるかもしれないけど、僕には恥ずかしいよ

#戦場ヶ原ひたぎ #阿良々木暦 #化物語 #物語シリーズ #コスプレ #ゴジラ
item.content:encoded:
-阿良々木くん、仮装するのにどうしてそんなに時間がかかるの？

-もう着たんだけど、トイレから出るのが恥ずかしいんだ

-さあ、恥ずかしがらないで、阿良々木くん。神原ちゃんと出かけるのが怖くなかったんだから、仮装して出かけるくらい怖くないでしょ

-でも、何言ってるの？！ ショッピングモールに行く途中で彼女に偶然会っただけだよ

-本当なら、何があっても仮装したまま出てきてよ

-でも、これ、子供用のゴジラの仮装だよ！

-でも、すごく可愛く似合ってるよ

-君にはそう見えるかもしれないけど、僕には恥ずかしいよ

#戦場ヶ原ひたぎ #阿良々木暦 #化物語 #物語シリーズ #コスプレ #ゴジラ

item.title: In 1997, a court ruled New York violated its own welfare law…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
In 1997, a court ruled New York violated its own welfare laws by offering too small an allowance to put toward rent, leaving poor families with children at risk of homelessness.

A new lawsuit argues that three decades later, that’s still happening.

w/ @nysfocus.com
item.content:encoded:
In 1997, a court ruled New York violated its own welfare laws by offering too small an allowance to put toward rent, leaving poor families with children at risk of homelessness.

A new lawsuit argues that three decades later, that’s still happening.

w/ @nysfocus.com

item.title: "If people wanted you to write warmly about them, they shoul…
item.author: Kwertzy Industries (@kwertzy.bsky.social)

item.content:encoded: "If people wanted you to write warmly about them, they should have behaved better." -- Anne Lamott

item.title: In memoriams don’t usually include how they died
item.author: ITYSL memes 💦🥩 (@ityslmemes.com)
item.description: In memoriams don’t usually include how they died
item.content:encoded: In memoriams don’t usually include how they died

item.title: Erling Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian men's team are …
item.author: Max B 💙 🔶 🇺🇦 🇬🇧 🇪🇺 (@maxbrockbank.com)
item.description:
Erling Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian men's team are paid the same as the women's team.

In 2017, they took a voluntary pay cut to allow the women's pay to be increased.

The move came from the players' union, not management.
item.content:encoded:
Erling Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian men's team are paid the same as the women's team.

In 2017, they took a voluntary pay cut to allow the women's pay to be increased.

The move came from the players' union, not management.

item.title: You're looking at a 200 year-old wisteria vine at Byakugou-j…
item.author: c0nc0rdance (@c0nc0rdance.bsky.social)
item.description:
You're looking at a 200 year-old wisteria vine at Byakugou-ji Temple in Tamba, Hyogo, Japan.

The delicate pink/purple blossoms create an otherworldly place where magic can happen.

But here's an interesting fact: wisteria are in the legume family (Fabaceae). This is a magic beanstalk.
item.content:encoded:
You're looking at a 200 year-old wisteria vine at Byakugou-ji Temple in Tamba, Hyogo, Japan.

The delicate pink/purple blossoms create an otherworldly place where magic can happen.

But here's an interesting fact: wisteria are in the legume family (Fabaceae). This is a magic beanstalk.

item.title: California's desert transforms into a sea of wildflowers dur…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: California's desert transforms into a sea of wildflowers during a super bloom, a rare event that can take over a decade to return. Poppies, phacelia, and sunflowers take over Anza-Borrego and Death Va
item.content:encoded: California's desert transforms into a sea of wildflowers during a super bloom, a rare event that can take over a decade to return. Poppies, phacelia, and sunflowers take over Anza-Borrego and Death Va

item.title: Doing a bit of work on the hare again today but it’s a bit t…
item.author: Lisa Wellwood Artist (@lisawellwoodartist.bsky.social)
item.description: Doing a bit of work on the hare again today but it’s a bit too hot in my little room to draw for long. #art #drawing #hares

item.title: Weather cycle threatens harvests worldwide, adding to inflat…
item.author: Guardian US (@us.theguardian.com)
item.description: Weather cycle threatens harvests worldwide, adding to inflation already fuelled by the Iran war
item.content:encoded: Weather cycle threatens harvests worldwide, adding to inflation already fuelled by the Iran war

item.title: The Defense Dept. has a rule: Only U.S. citizens or permanen…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
The Defense Dept. has a rule: Only U.S. citizens or permanent residents can handle sensitive data.

Then Microsoft created a workaround that seemed to violate the spirit of this rule, leaving computer systems vulnerable to Chinese government sabotage:
item.content:encoded:
The Defense Dept. has a rule: Only U.S. citizens or permanent residents can handle sensitive data.

Then Microsoft created a workaround that seemed to violate the spirit of this rule, leaving computer systems vulnerable to Chinese government sabotage:

item.title: Readers reply: Why put solar panels on green space when we c…
item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)
item.description: Readers reply: Why put solar panels on green space when we could put them over car parks?
item.content:encoded: Readers reply: Why put solar panels on green space when we could put them over car parks?

item.title: Going to pick up the Distinguished Gentleman “Furgus” today …
item.author: Tonnielle (@tonnielles.bsky.social)
item.description:
Going to pick up the Distinguished Gentleman “Furgus” today and make him a member of the family. His chest hair is shaved off in this photo because he had so many ticks in him they couldn’t get to all of them. He was underweight, had Lyme Disease and matted fur. He’s doing better now.
#RescueDogs
item.content:encoded:
Going to pick up the Distinguished Gentleman “Furgus” today and make him a member of the family. His chest hair is shaved off in this photo because he had so many ticks in him they couldn’t get to all of them. He was underweight, had Lyme Disease and matted fur. He’s doing better now.
#RescueDogs

item.title: Good morning! Happy Sunday! I hope everyone has a beautiful,…
item.author: Climb To The Clouds (@climbtotheclouds.bsky.social)
item.description:
Good morning! Happy Sunday!
I hope everyone has a beautiful, joy filled day 💛
#Stunday #photography #sunsets #goldenhour #ocean #beach #sky #reflections #clouds #ColorADay #OrangeSun #ECK #EastCoastKin #capecod

item.title: 👋 wasn’t going to post today as it’s been a tough week but …
item.author: Elke🇨🇦 (@elkep.bsky.social)
item.description: 👋 wasn’t going to post today as it’s been a tough week but I’ve just regained a crumb of hope. Have an excellent afternoon!
